meta.title: VerifyAI - Deep Reverse Image Search
meta.description: AI-powered photo verification tool, protecting every online interaction

hero.label: Deep Reverse Image Search
hero.description: Reverse trace the source and online history of any photo. VerifyAI searches multiple engines (Google Global Search, Google Lens, Yandex, commercial stock libraries, etc.) to show where the image has appeared and how it is being reused online.

features.label: Use Cases
features.title: "In this era of mixed truth online, helping you spot risks and protect relationships"
features.description: From dating apps to business dealings, VerifyAI has you covered

dating.title: Dating Apps
dating.description: Avoid fake photos and make every match with confidence

social.title: Social Media
social.description: Identify fake accounts and forged content to protect your digital safety

business.title: Business Dealings
business.description: Verify partner identity and reduce transaction risks

ecommerce.title: Online Shopping
ecommerce.description: Confirm seller authenticity and avoid scams and counterfeits

self_verification.title: Self Verification
self_verification.description: Check if your photos are being stolen or misused

howItWorks.label: Simple 3-Step Process
howItWorks.title: From Doubt to Confidence in Three Steps
howItWorks.description: A complete verification process for easy photo authenticity assessment

step1.title: Encounter Suspicious Photo
step1.description: Receive a suspicious photo on social media or dating platforms

step2.title: Share to VerifyAI
step2.description: Long-press the photo or upload directly from your album to VerifyAI

step3.title: Get Verification Report
step3.description: Receive a complete analysis and trace the photo's source

reverseSearch.title: Reverse Image Search
reverseSearch.description: Combines multiple search engines for comprehensive coverage, traces photo origins and usage history, checks if social media images are stolen

metadata.title: Metadata Analysis
metadata.description: Check photo modifications and source information

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Why We Do This
mission.intro: The simple reason we launched this app is because scams are rampant worldwide, and among them, the most despicable type exploits human kindness and emotional vulnerabilities — 'romance scams.'

value1.title: Bridging the Digital Divide
value1.description: With simple 'reverse image search,' you can discover that the 'selfie' sent by the other person actually belongs to someone else, preventing the victim from falling into the trap.

value2.title: The Most Awakening Tool for Victims
value2.description: 'Intellectually, they know it's a scam, but emotionally, they can't accept the person doesn't exist until they find the photo's real owner'
value2.citation: —Whitty, M. T., & Buchanan, T. (2016). The online dating romance scam.

value3.title: 100% Confirmation Rate
value3.description: Current AI-generated image detection technology still has uncertainties and cannot achieve complete confirmation, thus lacking the effect of 'awakening' victims. We use pHash image fingerprint technology to achieve 100% verification.

value4.title: The Only Resource in Isolation
value4.description: Most research shows that those falling victim to romance scams first enter a state of isolation (possibly deliberately guided by the scammer), so an app on a phone may be their only discussion partner.

expert.quote: Reverse image search — finding the original source of a photo — is the most evidence-based and persuasive approach.

victim.quote: It wasn't until I saw that the photo of the person I'd been chatting with actually belonged to someone with a completely different name that I finally realized I had been deceived.

team.quote: We simply want to make reverse image search a one-tap action for everyone, because we believe this alone can prevent so many scams.

campaign.label: Protect Together
campaign.title: Share with Those Who Need It
campaign.description: Someone around you may be trapped in doubt. Sharing this app could be the crucial step that helps them see the truth.

subscribe.title: Subscribe for Updates
subscribe.description: Subscribe for a chance to receive an Apple redemption code
subscribe.success: Thank you! Please check your inbox for confirmation.

share.title: Share with Friends
share.description: Help more people stay safe from online scams
share.message: VerifyAI - Deep reverse image search to protect your online safety

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Things you may want to know about VerifyAI

items.question: Will my uploaded photos be stored?
items.answer: No. Photos are only temporarily processed during the search and are deleted upon completion. They are never used to train models or shared with third parties.

items.question: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
items.answer: The free version uses 1 search engine; the Pro version simultaneously uses 5 professional engines, better suited for situations where you already feel something is off and want extra confirmation.

items.question: How long does a single search take?
items.answer: The free version takes about 10-20 seconds. The Pro version may take 30-60 seconds as it runs 5 engines, depending on network speed.

items.question: What is VerifyAI's main purpose?
items.answer: We focus on solving the problem of romance scammers who exploit online relationships. These scammers typically use stolen photos as their tools. VerifyAI helps you verify whether the photos from online contacts actually belong to them. If not, that person is highly suspicious and you should confront them directly or discuss with trusted friends and family.

items.question: How does VerifyAI work?
items.answer: If you reverse-search your own selfies or everyday photos online, you typically won't find matching results (unless you're a celebrity). Therefore, if someone's photo can be found extensively online with many "identical" matches, we consider that person highly suspicious. We suggest you exercise caution.

items.question: How does VerifyAI assess risk?
items.answer: We assess risk based on how many identical copies of a photo can be found online. The more copies found, the more famous the person in the photo likely is — and we assume celebrities are unlikely to seek online acquaintances. Photos from commercial stock libraries are the most suspicious, as they were purchased directly.

items.question: What are VerifyAI's limitations regarding fraud detection?
items.answer: 1. We are not a facial recognition app, so we cannot search for different angles or poses of the same person. 2. We cannot identify AI-generated images — current technology cannot guarantee 100% detection of AI-generated faces. We may add this feature when the technology matures. 3. Some regions (such as North Korea, China, etc.) have limited searchable portraits due to regulatory issues. We continue working on solutions.

items.question: Can I upload multiple photos at once?
items.answer: Currently, you can only upload one photo at a time. We will evaluate batch upload functionality in the future.

items.question: What if no results are found?
items.answer: The photo may be new, of poor quality, or outside the search scope. We suggest trying the Pro version or using a different photo.

cta.title: Ready to Trust with Evidence?
cta.description: Start using VerifyAI now to protect every online interaction

footer.brandDescription: Deep reverse image search — AI provides reliable identity verification for your social and business interactions.

termsOfService.metaDescription: VerifyAI Terms of Service - Complete terms and conditions for using the VerifyAI image search service
termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: Welcome to VerifyAI ("the Service" or "the App"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the VerifyAI mobile application and related services. By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, please do not use the Service.
termsOfService.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By using VerifyAI's services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. We may revise these Terms from time to time, and the revised Terms will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Service constitutes your agreement to be bound by the revised Terms.

sections.title: Service Description
paragraphs: VerifyAI is an AI-powered reverse image search application that provides the following services:
Search results are for reference only and do not constitute legal advice or factual determination.
items: Reverse Image Search: Trace photo origins through multiple search engines (Google, Google Lens, Yandex, Shutterstock, etc.)
Risk Assessment Reports: Provide risk assessment analysis based on search results
Photo Verification: Help users determine the authenticity and origin of online photos

sections.title: User Eligibility
paragraphs: You must be at least 13 years of age to use this Service. If you are a minor, you should use this Service with the consent of your legal guardian. By using this Service, you represent and warrant that you meet the above eligibility requirements.

sections.title: Account and Access
paragraphs: The Service is available for download through the Apple App Store. You need a valid Apple ID to download and use the App. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activities that occur through your account.

sections.title: Acceptable Use Policy
paragraphs: When using the Service, you agree not to:
items: Use the Service for any illegal purpose or in violation of any applicable laws
Upload or analyze images containing child sexual abuse material
Use the Service to stalk, harass, or threaten others
Attempt to decompile, disassemble, or otherwise reverse engineer the Service's source code
Circumvent or attempt to circumvent any technical protection measures of the Service
Use automated tools to mass access or scrape the Service
Use the Service's search results for purposes of discrimination, defamation, or invasion of privacy

sections.title: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: VerifyAI and all its content, features, and interfaces are the property of the Company or its licensors, protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. These Terms do not grant you any rights to use the Service's trademarks, logos, or brand names.

sections.title: Subscriptions and Payments
paragraphs: The Service offers a free version and a Pro subscription. Pro subscriptions are processed through the Apple App Store.

Subscriptions will automatically renew unless you turn off auto-renewal at least 24 hours before the end of the current subscription period. Subscription management and cancellation should be done through Apple App Store settings. Refund policies are governed by Apple's terms.

sections.title: User Content
paragraphs: Images you upload to the Service are used solely to provide search analysis services and are immediately deleted after analysis is complete. We do not store, archive, or back up any images you upload.
You represent and warrant that you have the legal right to use the images you upload and that your use does not infringe the rights of any third party.

sections.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraphs: The Service is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of search results. Search results are for reference only and should not be used as the sole basis for any legal action or personal decision.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, we expressly disclaim all warranties, whether express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Company and its affiliates, licensors, or service providers shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
Our maximum aggregate liability shall not exceed the total amount you paid to us in the 12 months prior to the date of the claim.

sections.title: Service Modifications and Termination
paragraphs: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service (in whole or in part) at any time without notice. We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuation of the Service.

sections.title: Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of China (Taiwan). Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the Taipei District Court, Taiwan as the court of first instance.

sections.title: Contact Information
paragraphs: If you have any questions or comments about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
Email: yizheng@fork.work

privacyPolicy.metaDescription: VerifyAI Privacy Policy - Learn how we handle and protect your personal information
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: Welcome to VerifyAI ("the App"). We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our services.
privacyPolicy.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

subsections.subtitle: Information You Provide Directly
items: Photos or Videos: Images you actively upload for analysis. This is central to our service.

subsections.subtitle: Information We Collect Automatically
items: User ID: An anonymous, randomly generated identifier used to manage your purchases and restore them, which is not linked to your real identity.
Purchases: Your purchase history within the App, used to verify your subscription status and unlock corresponding Pro features.
Product Interaction: Anonymous usage data, such as button clicks and feature usage, to help us understand how the App is used and improve it.
Diagnostics: Includes anonymous crash logs and performance data (e.g., launch times, error rates) used to maintain App stability and fix technical issues.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
items: Photos or Videos: Solely to provide the core image analysis service. We delete them immediately after analysis.
User ID and Purchases: To verify your payment status, unlock Pro features, and allow you to restore purchases on new devices or after reinstallation.
Product Interaction and Diagnostics: To monitor App stability, fix bugs, optimize performance, and understand how to improve the overall user experience.

sections.title: Information Sharing and Third-Party Services
paragraphs: We do not share your personal information with unrelated third parties. However, to fulfill the App's core functionality, we must transmit your data to the following third-party partners:
items: Apple: For processing all in-App Purchases (subscriptions, consumables) and receipt validation. We do not have access to your payment information.

RevenueCat: We use RevenueCat as our subscription and purchase management platform to help manage in-app purchases, validate receipts, track subscription status, and enable cross-platform purchase restoration.
Google (Cloud Vision API): Used for face detection and web image matching.
SerpAPI: Acts as a search proxy, forwarding images to Google Lens and Yandex for reverse image search.
Shutterstock: Used to confirm if an image originates from its commercial stock photo library.
ImgBB / tmpfiles.org: We temporarily upload images to these services so that certain analysis engines can access them via a URL.
Analytics and Diagnostics Services (e.g., Firebase, Sentry): We may share anonymous product interaction and diagnostic data with these services.

sections.title: Data Retention
paragraphs: We operate on a "use-and-discard" principle. Images you upload are only temporarily stored on our servers for the brief duration of the analysis task. Immediately after the analysis is complete, the original image data is permanently deleted. We never store, archive, or back up any of your original images.
Anonymous user IDs, purchase records, and diagnostic data may be retained for as long as necessary to maintain App functionality (e.g., purchase restoration) and for service improvement.

sections.title: Security
paragraphs: We implement commercially reasonable technical and administrative measures to protect your information. However, please understand that no internet transmission or electronic storage method is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
paragraphs: This App is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we may have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately, and we will delete the relevant information as soon as possible.

sections.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes within the App. We encourage you to review this policy periodically for the latest information.

sections.title: Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
Email: yizheng@fork.work
